columns.name: hashed_password
columns.comment: Password hash - NULL for Firebase-only users

columns.name: firebase_uid
columns.comment: Firebase user UID from Firebase Authentication

columns.name: auth_provider
columns.comment: Authentication provider: local (password) or firebase

columns.name: firebase_custom_claims
columns.comment: Firebase custom claims including role (admin/doctor) and permissions

columns.name: last_firebase_sync
columns.comment: Timestamp of last sync with Firebase Authentication

users.comment: Profissionais de saúde (médicos e administradores) - Supports local and Firebase authentication

patients.comment: Patient table with validated JSONB metadata (Migration 016)

message_status_events.comment: Rastreamento de mudanças de status de mensagens

flow_template_versions.comment: Versões de templates de fluxos conversacionais

patient_flow_states.comment: Estado atual de cada paciente em cada tipo de fluxo

columns.name: error_type
columns.comment: Type of error (DI_GENERATOR, ROLE_ENUM, SCHEMA_MISMATCH, etc.)

columns.name: error_message
columns.comment: The error message or description

columns.name: stack_trace
columns.comment: Full stack trace of the error (optional)

columns.name: context
columns.comment: Additional context data as JSON (request info, user data, etc.)

columns.name: count
columns.comment: Number of times this error has occurred (for deduplication)

columns.name: first_seen
columns.comment: When this error was first encountered

columns.name: last_seen
columns.comment: When this error was last encountered

columns.name: resolved
columns.comment: Whether this error has been resolved

columns.name: severity
columns.comment: Error severity level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)

error_logs.comment: Error tracking table for monitoring and debugging critical system errors

flow_states.comment: Tabela legacy de estados de fluxo (substituída por patient_flow_states)

quiz_template_versions_v2.comment: Sistema de versionamento aprimorado de questionários

quiz_sessions.comment: Sessões de questionários respondidos por pacientes (Schema v2 - status-based)

quiz_sessions_v2.comment: Versão melhorada de sessões com suporte a versionamento

columns.name: notification_type
columns.comment: Type: info, warning, error, success, alert, reminder

columns.name: priority
columns.comment: Priority: low, medium, high, urgent

columns.name: notification_metadata
columns.comment: Additional metadata in JSON format

columns.name: expires_at
columns.comment: Optional expiration timestamp for temporary notifications

notifications.comment: System notifications for users with support for patient-related alerts

columns.name: status
columns.comment: Status do item na fila: pending | retrying | failed | resolved.

columns.name: dlq_metadata
columns.comment: Additional failure information in JSONB format (renamed from metadata to avoid SQLAlchemy conflicts)

whatsapp_delivery_failures.comment: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) para falhas de envio de mensagens WhatsApp.

flow_messages.comment: Templates de mensagens usadas nos fluxos

webhook_events.comment: Armazenamento e replay de webhooks da Evolution API

security_audit_log.comment: Security audit log for WhatsApp access monitoring and threat detection

admin_audit_log.comment: Log de auditoria de ações administrativas

columns.name: updated_at
columns.comment: Auto-updated timestamp for record modifications (added 2025-10-06)

admin_security_events.comment: Eventos de segurança detectados no sistema admin

audit_log_entries.comment: Entradas genéricas de log de auditoria

alembic_version.comment: Controle de versão de migrações Alembic (gerenciado automaticamente)

audit_logs.comment: Security audit logs for authentication and authorization events
